The affected element is the function extract_to_json of the file src/entry.py. Performing a manipulation of the argument output_filename results in sql injection. Remote exploitation of the attack is possible. The exploit has been released to the public and may be used for attacks. The patch is named a5580cb992f4f6c308c9ffe6442b2e76709db548.
